title: space_get: N+1 query pattern — one get_space_members call per space row
description: jmap.rs space_get fetches spaces with store.get_spaces() then for each returned SpaceRow calls store.get_space_members(&s.id) — one DB round-trip per space. With N spaces this is O(N) queries. For small N (personal daemon, a few spaces) this is fine, but if a user accumulates many spaces the latency scales linearly. A JOIN query returning (space, member) tuples would collapse this to a single round-trip.
